creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
That patch file is nowhere in rrdtool or cmake, it is in libffi33.

devel/libffi33/Makefile
9:PATCHFILES+=  01a75ed76ea7e57f1b7a5c183e2b1e890e6aa0fd.diff:-p1

I would close this PR with feedback timeout. Please, feel free to reopen it and provide more information.

Thanks!
